name: Alchemy Web3 Developer API
description: Alchemy is a Web3 developer platform providing blockchain APIs for 50+ networks including Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and Solana. Use this API to query NFT data, token balances, transfers, prices, wallet portfolios, and interact with smart contracts across multiple blockchains.

capabilities.name: nfts_get_by_owner
capabilities.description: Retrieve all NFTs owned by a specific wallet address across collections with metadata, images, and attributes.

capabilities.name: nft_metadata_get
capabilities.description: Fetch detailed metadata for a specific NFT by contract address and token ID including name, description, image, and attributes.

capabilities.name: nft_metadata_batch_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for multiple NFTs across different contracts in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: nfts_get_by_contract
capabilities.description: Retrieve all NFTs belonging to a specific contract or collection with pagination support.

capabilities.name: nft_owners_get
capabilities.description: Get the owner(s) of a specific NFT by contract address and token ID.

capabilities.name: nft_owners_get_by_contract
capabilities.description: Retrieve all owners of NFTs within a specific contract with a snapshot at a given block number.

capabilities.name: nft_contracts_get_by_owner
capabilities.description: Return a list of all NFT contracts (collections) owned by a specific wallet address.

capabilities.name: nft_holder_check
capabilities.description: Check whether a wallet address holds any NFT from a specific collection.

capabilities.name: nft_floor_price_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the floor price of an NFT collection from supported marketplaces.

capabilities.name: nft_sales_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve historical NFT sales data across marketplaces with filtering by contract, token, and date range.

capabilities.name: nft_spam_contracts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of NFT contracts that have been classified as spam.

capabilities.name: nft_spam_check
capabilities.description: Check whether a specific NFT contract is classified as spam.

capabilities.name: nft_contract_metadata_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for an NFT contract including name, symbol, total supply, and token type.

capabilities.name: nft_metadata_refresh
capabilities.description: Trigger a metadata refresh for a specific NFT to update cached data.

capabilities.name: nft_rarity_compute
capabilities.description: Compute the rarity score of each attribute for a specific NFT within its collection.

capabilities.name: nft_contract_metadata_search
capabilities.description: Search for NFT contracts by keyword across contract names and metadata.

capabilities.name: token_balances_get
capabilities.description: Get ERC-20 token balances for a wallet address, including all tokens the address has ever transacted with.

capabilities.name: token_metadata_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata (name, symbol, decimals, logo) for a specific ERC-20 token contract.

capabilities.name: token_allowance_get
capabilities.description: Check the amount a spender is approved to withdraw from an owner's token balance.

capabilities.name: token_prices_get
capabilities.description: Get current USD prices for tokens by their contract addresses across supported networks.

capabilities.name: transfers_get
capabilities.description: Fetch historical asset transfers (ETH, ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155) for any address with filtering by block range, category, and contract.

capabilities.name: portfolio_tokens_get
capabilities.description: Get fungible token holdings (native, ERC-20) for one or more wallet addresses with balances, prices, and metadata.
